llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: Intern, Operations APAC_Onboarding
job.description: Job Descriptions: • Support process scale up using pilot data and modeling to enable full scale production. • Develop and apply data driven and hybrid models to predict process performance. • Partner with engineers to support technology transfer to commercial operations. 请时刻警惕任何可能的招聘欺诈行为！请注意，巴斯夫绝不会在任何情况下向候选人以任何形式收取任何费用。
